blocks.text: Hovland Hunts Augusta Redemption as Saturday Stacks Up Big

Burns and McIlroy share the Masters lead at -5 after Hovland's rough opening rounds — the comeback story writes itself. Meanwhile, Arsenal's title charge, a Catalan derby, and the FIDE Candidates' endgame make this Saturday unmissable.
⛳ Masters Tournament — Burns & McIlroy lead at -5, Hovland and Reitan battle to climb Augusta's leaderboard
♟️ FIDE Candidates Round 11 — with three rounds left, today could crown the World Championship challenger
⚽ Espanyol at Barcelona — Camp Nou Catalan derby, Barcelona's 76-point juggernaut faces local rivalry
